files: src/jinja2/ext.py
summary: trans_metadata feature done: added metadata dict parsing in parse() loop (note/created/modified with string-literal validation) and metadata param + trans_metadata attr assignment at end of _make_node(); call site now passes metadata as 7th positional arg. Should merge cleanly with domain param changes if you also add a new param/kwarg rather than reordering existing ones.
